ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or plot summary of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie in dollars */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* A short, catchy phrase often used in marketing */,
  "production_companies" TEXT /* List of companies involved in the production */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* List of countries where the movie was produced */,
  "spoken_languages" TEXT /* List of languages spoken in the movie */,
  "version" INTEGER /* To track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the movie record */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's poster image */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie (e.g., released, in production) */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Age rating or certification (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* The keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-keyword relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_keywords_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_keywords_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the actor */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the actor's profile picture */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-cast relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the actor's appearance in the cast list */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_cast_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_id") REFERENCES cast ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "person_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job or role of the crew member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the crew member */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the crew member */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the crew member */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the crew member's profile picture */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-crew relationship */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member (e.g., Directing, Production, Writing) */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job or role of the crew member */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the department */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the job role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_crew_id FOREIGN KEY ("crew_id") REFERENCES crew ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_crew_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, marketer, data analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the movie */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-10 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review contains spoilers */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being distributed */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distribution channel */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date of distribution */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory or region of distribution */,
  "revenue_share" REAL /* Percentage of revenue shared with the distribution channel */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., planned, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributions_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES distribution_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distributions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the distribution channel */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distribution channel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the distribution channel */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the distribution channel's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)
